titleStmt.title: SII 22.92: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 92. (A.R. No. 92 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. VIKRAMA-CHŌḶA—9th YEAR (A.D. 1126-7)

summary.p: The inscription is built in at the beginning of the lines. It seems to record a gift of 32 cows for burning a lamp in the temple of Tāntonṟīśvaram-Uḍaiyār at Śaṇbai by one Kūḍaluḍaiyāṉ Kulattāṉ Śēndaṉ of Kaḍambūr on the southern bank of the river in Vāṇagappāḍi (alias) Rājendra-vaḷanāḍu to atone for the death caused by him, of Pichchaṉ Paṉman Kaṇḍan of the same village in a quarrel (?). The relatives of the victim are said to have been consulted (by the donor ?) as to the course of action to be taken. Another gift of 32 cows to the temple of Tirunāgīśvaram-Uḍaiyār is mentioned at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmaātu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilava tannirupatumalar maṉnavar cūṭa maṉniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟu
kki meyyaṟan=taḻaippa kaliṅka miriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭappa Iru cuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟi virasiṅhā(ta)sa nattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷḷoṭum vi
caripaṟmarāṉa tripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 9- tāvatu vāṇakappāṭi Irājen=tiravaḷanāṭṭu peṇṇai ten(k)karai kaṭampūril lirukkum veḷḷāḷan kūṭalu
num Ivvūril lirukkum piccan paṉman kaṇṭanum Ivviruvarum tan=ta nilavurattān=tarattu Uruvik kuttinamaiyil Ikkūṭaluṭaiyāṉ kulattāṉ cen=taṉ kuttina kuttile paṉman kaṇṭan marittamai
ṭiyiruntu Ikkaṇṭan tamappanāṉa piccan panmaṉaiyum Ivan makan periyāṉaiyum Ivan=tampi muṉaiyaṉaiyum Ivan=tampi Akkaḷaṉaiyum Aḻaittu Ikkūṭaluṭaiyān kulattāṉ cen=tan kutti
ttuppom Ivanukku can=tirātittavaṟ celvatoru tanmam ceyyaveṇumeṉṟu conṉaviṭattu Ivarkaḷum nāṭṭukku Eṟiṉapaṭi ceyvatenṟu sammatittu Inṉāṭṭu peṇṇai vaṭakarai caṇpaiyāna vi
�ntonṟiśvaramuṭaiyārkoyililē Oru tirunun=tāviḷakku muppattiraṇṭu pacup poṟippatenṟu colla Ivarkaḷum Itukku Uṭanpaṭṭu Ip panmaṉ kaṇṭanukku kūṭaluṭaiyān kulattān cen=tan tan pa�
m tirunākicuvaramuṭaiyār koyilil viḷakkonṟum can=tirātittavaṟ celvatāka poṟitta pacu muppattiraṇṭum kaikkoṇṭom yik koyilil civappirāmaṇarom Itu panmāyeśvara [ rakṣ*] Ai .
Digital edition of SII 22.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
